title: Best Pharmacy College in Noida & Delhi NCR | Galgotias University
content: The Bachelor of Pharmacy program (B. Pharm) is designed to provide students with comprehensive and practical training for a career in Pharmaceutical Sciences. It is structured with an emphasis on research, innovation and creativity. This program trains students with a range of skills required for industry ready professional. It provides training on how drugs are developed, how patients use them, and how pharmacists can optimize patient care through interaction with other health professionals. The course is taught through a combination of lectures, seminars, flipped classes, practical and project-based learning. The Department has adequate infrastructure, laboratory facilities, computer center and a treasure trove of books for the students. XIIth with 60% marks and Physics & Chemistry as compulsory subjects with Math/Biology/ Biotechnology. The minimum age should be 17 years as on December 31st of each Admission Year. (Medical fitness certificate is mandatory to submit and it is to be endorsed by Government Medical Officer) For Lateral Entry: Passed Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma) with minimum 50% or 6.0 CGPA For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.pharma Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) XIIth with 50% and Biology & Chemistry as compulsory subjects, additional Math/ Physics / Biotechnology 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 09 10 11 01 Engage in continual professional development, and apply the knowledge of pharmaceutical sciences to advance the practice of pharmacy and improve clinical outcomes. 02 Deliver strategic competencies to aid the pharmaceutical industry in fostering economic development. 03 Ensure safe and ethical delivery of medications, promoting public health and enhancing community well-being through effective patient care and responsible business practices. 01 Capability to implement the principles and knowledge of Anatomy, Physiology, Pathophysiology, Microbiology, Pharmacology, Cosmetics, Biopharmaceutics and Pharmaceutical Formulations to enhance societal health and to formulate suitable methodologies for research and development. 02 To demonstrate and apply the knowledge of Pharmaceutical Chemistry, Medicinal Chemistry, Natural and Herbal products for the design, discovery and development of novel pharmaceuticals. 03 To foster the development of communication and leadership skills among students and to enhance their practical competencies through industrial training and research, enabling them to effectively meet the challenges of the pharmaceutical field. XIIth with 60% marks and Physics & Chemistry as compulsory subjects with Math/Biology/ Biotechnology. The minimum age should be 17 years as on December 31st of each Admission Year. (Medical fitness certificate is mandatory to submit and it is to be endorsed by Government Medical Officer) For Lateral Entry: Passed Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma) with minimum 50% or 6.0 CGPA For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.pharma Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) XIIth with 50% and Biology & Chemistry as compulsory subjects, additional Math/ Physics / Biotechnology
